---
title: "Building This Blog with Quarto"
author: "Craig"
date: "2026-06-14"
categories: [quarto, meta]
description: "How Oda World is built with Quarto — a fast, reproducible publishing workflow."
---

This site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/), a scientific and technical publishing system that works beautifully for blogs.

### Why Quarto?

- **Markdown-first** — write in `.qmd` files with optional code execution
- **Fast previews** — `quarto preview` hot-reloads as you edit
- **Flexible output** — HTML, PDF, slides, and more from the same source
- **Built-in blog features** — listings, categories, RSS feeds, and search

### Project structure

```text
.
├── _quarto.yml       # site configuration
├── _brand.yml        # colors, fonts, and branding
├── index.qmd         # home page with post listing
├── about.qmd         # about page
├── posts/            # blog posts (one folder per post)
└── styles.css        # custom styles
```

### Useful commands

```bash
# Preview locally with live reload
quarto preview

# Build the full site to _site/
quarto render

# Add a new post
quarto create contents post --title "My New Post" --path posts/my-new-post
```

Quarto handles the rest — navigation, RSS, and a clean reading experience out of the box.
